---
macros-file: polish-space/tex/macros.tex
---

# Index entries {#sec:index-entries}

A flat raw index entry becomes a term "defined in"
entry.\index{standard Borel space}

A hierarchical raw index entry is a genuine makeindex subentry and is passed
through verbatim.\index{forcing!tripos}

A three-level subentry is preserved and does not overflow
makeindex.\index{represented space!products!finite}

An entry that already carries an index encapsulation is left
alone.\index{logic action!referenced by}
